'''Aphran''' was the [[Aphran system/Legends|Aphran system's]] [[Star/Legends|primary]]. On [[Aphran IV]], Aphran appeared as a red-gold orb during sunset, making its green-blue [[lake]]s appear as brilliant gold.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
